creator: w.litter@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 158477
mod_evasive24_shar.tar.gz

I am trying to creating a the new mod_evasive24 with the newer source from
https://github.com/shivaas/mod_evasive/blob/master/mod_evasive24.c.
I omit the pkg-descr cause the file will be to big as attachment, but it's the same like the existing www/evasive port.
MASTER_SITES had to be changed.

It's my first try to make a port, and I fear it is not all ok, but I hope.
